definition: Reduction in people assets services and ecosystems placed in hazard-prone areas
measurement_note: Use heat flood coastal wildfire pollution and critical-service exposure mapping

definition: Reduction in social health housing economic and environmental susceptibility to harm
measurement_note: Use housing quality income health disability age service access energy burden and historical disinvestment indicators

definition: Ability to maintain or restore essential urban services during disruption
measurement_note: Use water power transit sanitation health cooling communications food access shelter and emergency response metrics

definition: Ability to learn update rules finance interventions revise standards and adjust as conditions change
measurement_note: Use monitoring implementation budgets flexible planning community participation and institutional learning evidence

definition: Contribution of green blue and hybrid infrastructure to reducing heat flood air-quality and water stress
measurement_note: Use tree canopy wetlands soils parks permeable surfaces biodiversity and maintenance indicators

definition: Extent to which resilience investments protect vulnerable residents and avoid displacement
measurement_note: Use disaggregated exposure recovery participation housing security anti-displacement safeguards and accessibility data

definition: Risk that an intervention transfers risk creates false security displaces residents increases emissions or excludes groups
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger maladaptation review and safeguards
